final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, magazine cover
Primary request: ultra-wide-angle Antarctic landscape with Emperor penguin colony marching on sea ice
Scene/backdrop: Ross Ice Shelf, Antarctica, massive blue glacier with deep crevasses, distant icebergs floating on calm polar sea
Subject: hundreds of Emperor penguins in formation on ice, foreground close-up showing black-and-white plumage with orange-yellow beak details, chicks huddling at parents' feet
Style/medium: National Geographic documentary photography, realistic color reproduction
Composition/framing: ultra-wide-angle, low horizon line, expansive glacier dominating upper frame, penguin procession leading eye through scene
Lighting/mood: midnight sun low on horizon, ethereal pale golden polar sky, surreal blue ice glowing from within crevasses, warm-cool color interplay, majestic yet fragile atmosphere
Color palette: deep sapphire to pale blue ice, warm golden sky, black-and-white penguin feathers with orange beak accents
Materials/textures: crystalline ice with visible strata and cracks, dense waterproof penguin feathers, smooth sea ice surface
Constraints: maintain realistic scale of penguin colony, preserve the ethereal midnight sun lighting characteristic of polar summer
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial HDR effects, cartoonish penguin proportions, lens flare artifacts, watermark
